title: MemirZabri's BoraLo Pack
description: This project will turn the mod pack that BoraLo uses in his videos into a single mod, increasing the connection between them and allowing you to play as in the video.
body: # BoraLo Pack by MemirZabri This mod requires [MixinBooter](https://modrinth.com/mod/mixinbooter), [MorePlayerModels](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/more-player-models) and [ElectroBlob's Wizardry](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/electroblobs-wizardry). The mod will not work without installing these mods. - This mod allows you to experience almost every feature in BoraLo's video in your own Minecraft world. Adding a whole new dimension to the game, this mod takes you far beyond ordinary sandbox gameplay and invites you to a dark and mysterious universe. - The mod is based entirely on Creepypasta. We've compiled the creepiest Minecraft legends from around the internet to create a profound atmosphere of horror. The mod features a wide range of horror elements, from classic figures like Giant Alex and Giant Steve to lesser-known but equally disturbing characters like Code-Man and bobby1545. - Every item and entity has a purpose and function in the mod. More than just decorative, these items provide the player with clues, trigger hidden mechanisms, or change the course of the story. Players become part of a deeper mystery with every new object or entity they encounter. - This mod isn't just a gaming experience; It's also an interactive story based on discovery, survival, and resolution. Every detail you encounter might be a harbinger of the next Creepypasta figure... Step into that world if you dare. MemirZabri's BoraLo Mod © 2024 by MemirZabri is licensed under CC BY 4.0
